creator: john@coastalgeology.org
text:
Libgrass5 is a library containing the all of the functions
	that are available in the GRASS GIS program. The functions are
	compiled externally and built into this library so that other
	applications can open, save and manipulate image data for use
	with GRASS. GRASS is not necessary for this port, it is a
	stand alone library.

How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
